creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Fri, May 25, 2001 at 04:06:25PM +0400, Dmitry L. Iovtchev wrote:

> It's not only firmware imperfection, because on previous version of
> Fr.BSD it works. At my opinion, you have changed something into
> storage subsystem and have eliminated support of old hardware.

Okay, we can leave this report open if you want to pursue it by
sending more information later.

Kris
